LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GOOGLE INC. AND NEVENGINEERING, INC.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING. SEE WORD MINUTES ON REGISTER OF ACTION FOR JULY 24/25, 2007. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. LEAVE TO AMEND WITHIN 20 DAYS OF SERVICE OF THE ORDER IS GRANTED. AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION RULING THE LAST SENTENCE IN THE COURT'S RULING "IT ALSO APPEARS THAT PARAGRAPH 6.1 IS UNENFORCEABLE AS CONTRARY TO PUBLIC POLICY" IS STRICKEN. AS TO THE 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION, OVERRULED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO GOOGLE RENEWING. THE REMAINDER OF THE RULING STANDS. MR. TAYLOR IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-24-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT GOOGLE INC. AND NEVENGINEERING, INC.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT MODIFIES ITS TENTATIVE RULING. SEE WORD MINUTES ON REGISTER OF ACTION FOR JULY 24/25, 2007. Demurrer is sustained in part and overruled in part. Leave to amend within 20 days of service of the order is granted. As to the first cause of action ruling the last sentence in the Court's ruling "It also appears that paragraph 6.1 is unenforceable as contrary to public policy" is stricken. As to the 11th cause of action, overruled without prejudice to Google renewing. The remainder of the ruling stands. MR. TAYLOR IS TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-19-2007 Continued To Jul-24-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
